# robots.txt for ToolFocus — https://toolfocus.in

# Generated by Next.js robots.ts — this file is a fallback only.

# The authoritative version is served from /robots.txt via app/robots.ts

User-agent: *
Allow: /

# Block only backend/internal routes

Disallow: /api/

# IMPORTANT: Allow Next.js static assets for proper rendering & indexing

Allow: /_next/
Allow: /static/

# AI crawlers are ALLOWED — they help with discoverability and citations.

# See /llms.txt for a structured description of this site for AI systems.

Sitemap: https://toolfocus.in/sitemap.xml
Host: https://toolfocus.in
